completed_since_last_snapshot: P0 governance infrastructure authored: docs/requirements_backlog.md (67 REQs, four-state), docs/IRD.md (12-phase roadmap + DAG + milestones), docs/task_slices.md (session-sized units), docs/execution_plan.md (P0+P1), docs/session_protocol.md
Meta layer seeded: meta/project_knowledge_graph.json (6 nodes), meta/design_memory_ledger.json (5 accepted decisions dm-0001..dm-0005)
Toolchain: package.json, tsconfig.json (strict), .npmrc pinned to public registry, .gitignore; TypeScript 5.9.3 installed; git initialised on main
P1 core modules landed (NOT yet compiled/tested): src/core/Vec2.ts, src/core/Rng.ts, src/core/Clock.ts, src/core/State.ts, src/systems/System.ts, src/core/StateManager.ts

Protocol enforcement layer added: CLAUDE.md (auto-loaded), .claude/settings.json SessionStart hook running .claude/hooks/session_start.js (injects reboot reminder + this handoff every session), plus the new .claude/skills/jump-once-task SDLC skill for driving one slice end-to-end

Deterministic SDLC gate added: tools/sdlc/gate.js + tools/sdlc/sdlc.yaml (recipe), wired to a Stop hook (warn mode) and `npm run gate` / `npm run gate:full`. Catches drift: src changed w/o PKG, placeholders, stale handoff, backlog VERIFIED without report, red tests. Design in dm-0006. Gate currently GREEN (fast gates); tests-green fails as expected until P1 tests exist.

Stage-management system added: tools/sdlc/stage.js tracks the active slice through the 9 stages, persisting meta/active_task.json (live) + meta/runs/ (archive) for mid-slice resumability. New gate `stage-consistency` cross-checks stage claims vs reality. session_start hook now surfaces any mid-flight slice + its current stage. Use: `node tools/sdlc/stage.js start|advance|criterion|status|done|abort`, `npm run stage`.

exact_execution_focus.pending_logical_transformation: Implement slice S1.7: the Read->Process->Emit loop. It must (1) call Clock.advance(realDelta) to get a whole step count, (2) for each step, run the registered System pipeline as pure state->state transforms, incrementing tick by exactly 1 per step, (3) commit each new snapshot through StateManager, (4) expose interpolationAlpha for the renderer. Keep it allocation-aware; no gameplay assumptions (stays generic over TWorld).

blocked_by.reason: No blockers. Engine (S1.7) depends only on already-written Clock, System, StateManager.

critical_warnings_for_next_session: RUN THE REBOOT LIFECYCLE FIRST: the P1 core modules have NOT yet been compiled or tested. Before writing Engine.ts, run `npm run typecheck` to confirm the six landed modules build under strict mode; tsconfig has noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters ON, so unused symbols will error.

Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS in Clock.ts or introduce delta-time scaling to smooth motion — it reintroduces hardware dependence and breaks deterministic replay + the future trajectory solver (design memory dm-0003).

Do NOT mutate the GameState tree in place to chase §17 zero-allocation. Immutability is the current correctness contract; zero-allocation is deferred to P11 and scoped to pooled entities only (design memory dm-0004).
The private npm mirror npm.shootsta.com is broken; .npmrc pins registry.npmjs.org. Do not remove it or installs will fail.
Content generation (P10) is HARD-GATED behind milestone M2 (GDOS + validation + tools verified). Do not generate any level/chapter content before then, per the Directive and PRD §9.

The SessionStart hook was created mid-session; Claude Code's settings watcher may not register it until the user opens /hooks once or restarts. If this reminder text is visible to you, the hook IS firing.
next_session_pick_list: S1.10 P1 verification report -> close M0
